module_title: A2 Review, Fluency and Functional Tasks
lesson_title: A2 Review, Fluency and Functional Tasks: Writing Lesson 6
learning_objective: Learners can describe, compare and exchange simple information in a writing task about free time.
cefr_outcome: Learners can communicate in simple and routine tasks requiring direct exchange of information.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise writing for a2 review, fluency and functional tasks. You will learn useful language connected to free time and practise going to. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at A2 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: going to. Vocabulary theme: free time. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At A2, learners should describe, compare and exchange simple information with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use going to to talk about free time.
Example 2: The learner gives a A2 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for A2.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using going to.
options: Correct use of going to in a A2 sentence.
Incorrect word order with going to.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses going to accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of going to.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the free time phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand free time.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand free time.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form going to. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about free time using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: A2 Writing Check - A2 Review, Fluency and Functional Tasks
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short writing task using going to and vocabulary from free time.
success_criteria: Uses going to with reasonable accuracy
Uses vocabulary connected to free time
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses going to and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to free time.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about free time. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short A2 response about free time. Include the target language: going to.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for A2-M06-L06. Speaker one: Today we are practising free time. Speaker two: I need to use going to correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Going To form
visual_activity_cards.alt_text: Visual grammar card for going to
